description_long: This object is a rectangular filing cabinet with a wood grain finish, featuring a smooth, continuous surface on all visible sides. The cabinet has a boxy, monolithic appearance, with no visible handles, label holders, or drawer seams, suggesting a minimalist or modern design. The wood texture is consistent across all faces, with horizontal striations that mimic natural wood patterns. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing items such as office supplies or decor. The cabinet appears solid and robust, likely constructed from engineered wood or laminated panels. Its overall form and finish suggest it is designed for indoor use, particularly in professional or organized environments.
description: A solid, rectangular filing cabinet with a seamless wood grain finish and a minimalist, handle-less design.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat, uninterrupted wood grain surface with no visible handles or drawer seams.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same continuous wood grain pattern and flat surface.
description_view_2: Another side view, mirroring the previous ones, with a consistent wood texture and no visible features.
description_view_3: The rear or alternate side view, again showing a seamless wood grain surface with no distinguishing marks.
